.ckit-badge_wrapper { font-size: 11px; position: absolute; z-index: 1; left: 10px; top: 10px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: flex-start; }
div.product .ckit-badge_wrapper { font-size: 12px; }
.ckit-badge_wrapper.ckit-badge-summary { position: unset; }
.sale-item.product-label + .ckit-badge_wrapper, .onsale + .ckit-badge_wrapper { top: 36px; }
.ckit-badge { padding: 3px 9px; margin-bottom: 5px; line-height: 15px; text-align: center; border-radius: 3px; opacity: 0.8; pointer-events: none; background: #e24ad3; color: #fff; }
#commercegurus-pdp-gallery-wrapper { position: relative; }
#commercegurus-pdp-gallery-wrapper .ckit-badge_wrapper { z-index: 2; }

/* -- Shoptimizer -- */
.theme-shoptimizer .woocommerce-image__wrapper .product-label.type-circle { left: 10px; }
.theme-shoptimizer .sale-item.product-label.type-circle + .ckit-badge_wrapper { top: 50px; }
/* -- RTL -- */
.rtl .ckit-badge_wrapper {left: auto;right: 10px;}
@media (min-width: 771px) {
	.rtl .cgkit-gallery-vertical-scroll .ckit-badge_wrapper {margin-right: 65px;margin-left: 0;}
	.cgkit-gallery-vertical-left .ckit-badge_wrapper { margin-left: 100px; }
}
@media only screen and (max-width: 992px) and (min-width: 771px) {
	.rtl .cgkit-gallery-vertical-scroll .ckit-badge_wrapper {margin-right: 40px;margin-left: 0;}
}
</style>

		<style type="text/css" id="wp-custom-css">
			/** Variables **/
:root {
    --scrub-daddy-font: 'Museo Sans Rounded', Arial, sans-serif;
    --weight-medium: 500;
    --weight-bold: 700;
    --weight-ultra-bold: 900;
    --scrub-daddy-blue: #0033a1;
    --scrub-daddy-blue-hover: #0033a1;
    --scrub-daddy-orange: #ffb03a;
    --scrub-daddy-yellow: #ffff00;
    --scrub-daddy-white: #fff;
    --scrub-daddy-black: #000;
    --scrub-daddy-grey: #444;
    --scrub-daddy-light-grey: #ccc;
    --radius-2em: 2em;
    --box-shadow-light: 3px 4px 4px #0033a150;
    --button-font-size: 15px;
    --button-padding: 19px 50px;
    --transition-duration: 0.2s;
    --modal-box-shadow: 1px 1px 40px grey;
    --icon-size: 28px;
    --widget-width: 50%;
}
/** Cookiebot **/
#CybotCookiebotDialog #CybotCookiebotDialogBody .CybotCookiebotScrollContainer {
    display: flex;
    flex: auto;
    height: auto;
    max-height: 37.5em !important;
    overflow: hidden;
}

#CybotCookiebotDialogPoweredbyImage {
	max-height: 4.5em !important;
}
#CybotCookiebotDialogHeader{
	background: var(--scrub-daddy-orange) !important;
}

#CybotCookiebotDialogBodyUnderlay {
	background-color: var(--scrub-daddy-blue) !important;
}

/** General Utility Classes **/
.sr-only {
    position: absolute;
    width: 1px;
    height: 1px;
    padding: 0;
    margin: -1px;
    overflow: hidden;
    clip: rect(0, 0, 0, 0);
    white-space: nowrap;
    border: 0;
}

.topbutton {
    display: none;
}

.svg-wrapper {
    z-index: 1 !important;
}

/** Theme-Specific Adjustments **/
body.single-product:has(:not(.woocommerce-breadcrumb)) .site-main,
body:has(:not(.woocommerce-breadcrumb)) .site-content {
    padding-top: 0 !important;
}

#wp-admin-bar-wpseo-menu, 
#wp-admin-bar-helpie-review-settings, 
#wp-admin-bar-wp-logo, 
#wp-admin-bar-comments {
    display: none;
}

/** Header Styles **/
.section-headers-blue-h2 {
    font-size: 32px;
    font-weight: var(--weight-ultra-bold);
    color: var(--scrub-daddy-blue);
}

/** Footer Styles **/
footer.site-footer li,
footer.site-footer p {
    font-weight: var(--weight-bold);
    height: 30px;
    display: flex;
}

.site-footer .media_image-2 img {
    text-align: center;
}

#tf_phone a {
    text-decoration: underline;
}

footer.copyright a:hover,
footer.site-footer a:hover {
    text-decoration: none !important;
}

/** Search Modal **/
dialog.shoptimizer-modal[data-shoptimizermodal-id=searchToggle] {
    margin: auto !important;
    height: max-content  !important;
}

dialog.shoptimizer-modal[data-shoptimizermodal-id=searchToggle] .shoptimizer-modal--container {
    width: 45vw !important;
    height: fit-content !important;
    border-radius: 2em !important;
    padding-top: 0 !important;
    box-shadow: var(--modal-box-shadow) !important;
}

dialog.shoptimizer-modal[data-shoptimizermodal-id=searchToggle] .shoptimizer-modal--content {
    max-width: 90%  !important;
    padding: 0  !important;
}

.search-extras {
    padding: 50px 10px 10px;
}

/** WooCommerce Styles **/
.woocommerce-account .button {
    border-left-color: rgba(0, 60, 175, 1) !important;
    padding: 10px 15px;
}

.product-out-of-stock {
    color: #a61e00;
    text-transform: uppercase;
}

.stock.out-of-stock {
    text-transform: uppercase;
    font-weight: var(--weight-bold);
}

/** Social Icons **/
.social-icons {
    display: flex;
    gap: 20px;
    margin-top: 10px;
}

.social-icons a {
    display: inline-block;
    text-decoration: none;
}

.social-icons i {
    transition: transform var(--transition-duration) ease, fill var(--transition-duration) ease;
}

.social-icons a:hover svg {
    fill: var(--scrub-daddy-blue);
}

/** Button Styles **/
.button,
input[type=submit],
input[type=button],
input[type=reset] {
    border-radius: var(--radius-2em) !important;
    text-transform: capitalize;
}

/** Homepage Styles **/
figure.why-choose-img {
    height: 60% !important;
    width: 60% !important;
}

.icon-wrapper svg {
    stroke: var(--scrub-daddy-black);
    height: var(--icon-size);
    width: var(--icon-size);
    vertical-align: middle;
}

.widget_media_image img {
    margin-left: auto;
    margin-right: auto;
    width: var(--widget-width);
    display: block;
}

h1.wp-block-heading.has-text-align-left {
    text-align: left;
}

h1.has-text-align-right,
p.has-text-align-right {
    text-align: right !important;
}

h2.wp-block-heading.has-text-align-right {
    text-align: right;
}

.page-template-template-homepage .wp-block-cover .wp-block-cover__inner-container p {
    text-shadow: 1px 3px 0rem var(--scrub-daddy-black), 0 3px 10px var(--scrub-daddy-black);
    font-family: var(--scrub-daddy-font);
    font-weight: var(--weight-ultra-bold);
}

.btn-go-shop a {
    font-family: var(--scrub-daddy-font);
    font-weight: var(--weight-ultra-bold);
    text-transform: uppercase;
}

.btn-go-shop a:hover {
    color: var(--scrub-daddy-white) !important;
    background-color: var(--scrub-daddy-blue) !important;
    transition: 0.2s ease-in-out;
}

.btn-bbq a:hover {
    color: var(--scrub-daddy-blue) !important;
    background-color: var(--scrub-daddy-white) !important;
    transition: 0.2s ease-in-out;
}

.hp-vector-btn a {
    transition: 0.2 ease-in-out;
}

.hp-vector-btn a:hover {
    color: var(--scrub-daddy-white) !important;
    background-color: var(--scrub-daddy-blue-hover) !important;
}

.hp-vector img {
    border-radius: 20em 20em 2em 2em;
    margin: auto;
}

.hp-callouts {
    align-items: normal;
}

.why-choose-img {
    text-align: center;
}

.why-choose-img img {
    background: var(--scrub-daddy-blue);
}

img.has-border-color {
    border: 2px solid;
}

.bbq-text-right-align {
    text-align: right;
}

.cat-name {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
    height: 3.8em;
    margin: 0;
}

.cat-name-button {
    margin: 0;
}

.cat-box {
    display: flex;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    align-items: flex-end;
    height: 100%;
    overflow: hidden;
    box-shadow: var(--box-shadow-light);
}

.cat-info,
.cat-button {
    width: 100%;
}

.cat-button-container {
    margin-top: 0px !important;
}

.cat-body {
    margin-top: 0;
}

.cat-info h3 {
    padding: 30px 15px 25px 15px;
}

.flex-row-cat-items {
    transition: transform var(--transition-duration);
}

.flex-row-cat-items:hover {
    transform: scale(1.05);
}

.flex-row-cat-items a:hover {
    color: var(--scrub-daddy-white);
}

.center-col,
.center-col img {
    text-align: center;
    margin: auto;
}

.hp-video video,
.video-container iframe,
.rll-youtube-player {
    border-radius: var(--radius-2em) !important;
}

.flex-row {
    display: flex;
    align-items: baseline !important;
}

/** Parallax Background **/
.parallax-cover {
	  height: 650px;
}

.parallax-cover .svg-wrapper {
	position: fixed !important;
}

.page-template-template-homepage .wp-block-cover > img {
	opacity: 1;
}

.hero-font {
	text-shadow: 6px 6px 4px rgba(0, 0, 0,0.4);
}

/** FAQ Section **/
.helpie-faq.accordions .search__icon {
    display: none;
}

.helpie-faq.accordions article.accordion {
    margin: 1em 0;
}

.helpie-faq-col .entry-content ol ol, 
.helpie-faq-col .entry-content ul ul {
    margin: 0em 0em 0em 0.5em;
}

/** Below Content Adjustments **/
.below-content .widget i {
    position: absolute;
    top: 12px;
}

/** Wave Footer **/
.wave-bottom {
    position: absolute;
    bottom: 0;
    padding: 0;
}

.wave-footer img {
    display: grid;
    width: 100%;
}

/** Hide Elements in Firefox **/
@-moz-document url-prefix() {
    .wave-footer img,
    .svg-wrapper {
        display: none;
    }
}

/** AJAX Search Window **/
a.commercekit-ajs-product:hover,
a.commercekit-ajs-post:hover {
    color: var(--scrub-daddy-orange) !important;
}

/** Top Bar Message Wrapping Fix **/
.top-bar p {
    max-width: 100% !important;
}

/** Top Banner Price Total **/
.header-4 .search-trigger svg {
    width: var(--icon-size) !important;
    height: var(--icon-size) !important;
    vertical-align: middle;
}

.header-4 .header-4-container {
    border-bottom: none !important;
}

.header-4 .search-trigger span {
	border-color: black;
}

.shoptimizer-cart-icon svg {
    width: var(--icon-size) !important;
    height: var(--icon-size) !important;
    stroke: var(--scrub-daddy-black) !important;
    vertical-align: inherit;
}

.page-title,
.product_title {
    text-align: left !important;
}

.site-header-cart a.cart-contents .shoptimizer-cart-icon .mini-count {
    display: inline-block;
    position: relative;
    top: 10px !important;
    left: -10px !important;
    width: 25px !important;
    height: 25px !important;
    border-radius: 50%;
    background-color: var(--scrub-daddy-grey);
    border: 1px solid var(--scrub-daddy-grey);
    font-size: 10px !important;
    line-height: 22px !important;
    text-align: center;
    transition: 0.2s all;
}

.site-header-cart a.cart-contents .shoptimizer-cart-icon .mini-count {
    border-color: var(--scrub-daddy-grey);
    background-color: var(--scrub-daddy-blue) !important;
}

.shoptimizer-cart .woocommerce-Price-amount {
    display: none;
}

/** Buy Now Button **/
.buynowbtn {
    font-size: var(--button-font-size);
    font-weight: var(--weight-medium);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    fill: var(--scrub-daddy-white);
    color: var(--scrub-daddy-white);
    background-color: var(--scrub-daddy-blue);
    border-radius: var(--radius-2em) !important;
    padding: var(--button-padding);
    transition: var(--transition-duration) ease-in-out;
}

/** Listrak **/
#ltkpopup-content p, 
#ltkpopup-content .ltkpopup-content-para {
    width: 80%;
    text-align: center;
}

/** Slide-Out Cart **/
.cart-drawer-heading {
    color: var(--scrub-daddy-blue) !important;
    font-size: 20px;
    font-weight: var(--weight-ultra-bold);
    line-height: 26px;
    letter-spacing: 0em;
    text-align: left;
}

.widget_shopping_cart p.buttons,
.widget_shopping_cart p.total {
    text-align: center !important;
}

p.woocommerce-mini-cart__buttons.buttons {
    margin: auto;
    width: 100%;
}

.widget_shopping_cart p.total {
    padding: 1.2em 0 0 0;
    font-weight: var(--weight-bold);
    max-width: 100% !important;
}

.widget_shopping_cart .woocommerce-mini-cart__total strong,
.widget_shopping_cart .woocommerce-mini-cart__total .woocommerce-Price-amount {
    float: none !important;
}

a.button.wc-forward {
    border-radius: var(--radius-2em);
    color: var(--scrub-daddy-blue);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    font-weight: var(--weight-bold);
    border: solid 3px var(--scrub-daddy-blue);
    background: var(--scrub-daddy-orange);
}

a.button.checkout.wc-forward {
    background: var(--scrub-daddy-blue) !important;
    border: solid 3px var(--scrub-daddy-blue) !important;
    text-transform: uppercase !important;
    font-weight: var(--weight-bold) !important;
}

.woocommerce-cart p.return-to-shop {
    text-align: center !important;
    max-width: 100% !important;
}

form.woocommerce-ordering {
    border: 1px solid gainsboro;
    padding: 3px;
}

.shoptimizer-archive h1 {
    text-align: center;
    text-transform: capitalize;
    color: var(--scrub-daddy-blue);
}

.woocommerce-order {
    margin-top: 60px;
}

.woocommerce-order h2 {
    font-size: 21px;
}

.woocommerce ul.order_details li strong {
    font-size: 16px !important;
}

.woocommerce-checkout ul.order_details li {
    font-size: 18px !important;
}

#ship-to-different-address {
    border-top: none;
}

.woocommerce-order-received .woocommerce-order-details,
section.woocommerce-columns.woocommerce-columns--2.woocommerce-columns--addresses.col2-set.addresses {
    padding: 35px 35px 0 35px;
    margin-bottom: 30px;
    border: 1px solid #e2e2e2;
    position: relative;
    transition: all 180ms ease 0s;
    border-radius: 8px 26px 8px 8px;
}

h4.woocommerce-notice.woocommerce-notice--success.woocommerce-thankyou-order-received {
    text-align: center;
    font-size: 24px;
}

.btn.medium-240 {
    width: 240px;
    padding: 15px 20px;
    font-size: 19px;
    font-size: 1.1875rem;
    line-height: 1;
}

.btn.yellow {
    background: var(--scrub-daddy-yellow);
    box-shadow: 0 2px 0 0 var(--scrub-daddy-blue);
}

body .woocommerce #respond input#submit.alt,
body .woocommerce a.button.alt,
body .woocommerce button.button.alt,
body .woocommerce input.button.alt,
.product .cart .single_add_to_cart_button,
.shoptimizer-sticky-add-to-cart__content-button a.button,
.widget_shopping_cart a.button.checkout,
#cgkit-tab-commercekit-sticky-atc-title button,
#cgkit-mobile-commercekit-sticky-atc button {
    font-size: 15px;
    font-weight: var(--weight-medium);
    text-transform: uppercase !important;
    fill: var(--scrub-daddy-white);
    color: var(--scrub-daddy-white);
    background-color: var(--scrub-daddy-blue);
    border-radius: var(--radius-2em);
}

body .main-navigation ul.menu li.menu-item-has-children.full-width>.sub-menu-wrapper li a.button,
body ul.products li.product .added_to_cart,
body ul.products li.product .button {
    border-radius: var(--radius-2em);
}

#menu-mobile li a:hover,
.mobile-extra li a:hover {
    color: var(--scrub-daddy-blue);
}

ul.products li.product:not(.product-category)::before {
    border-radius: var(--radius-2em);
    box-shadow: 0 51 161px rgba(0, 0, 0, .1);
}

li.product img,
.swiper-slide img,
div.cgkit-video-wrap video {
    border-radius: var(--radius-2em);
}

/** Single Product Page **/
.woocommerce p {
    text-align: left !important;
}

.related h2 {
    text-transform: capitalize;
}

section.related-wrapper {
    display: none;
}

.woocommerce-Price-amount {
    color: var(--scrub-daddy-blue);
}

.woocommerce-breadcrumb {
    margin-bottom: 20px !important;
}

.wp-image-722459 {
    padding-bottom: 20px;
}

/** Products Overview Page **/
.woocommerce-pagination .page-numbers li .page-numbers.current {
    color: var(--scrub-daddy-blue) !important;
    border-bottom: 2px solid var(--scrub-daddy-blue);
}

/** Bold Product Price **/
bdi {
    font-weight: var(--weight-bold);
}

/** Trust Badges **/
.product-widget fieldset {
    background: #f8f8f8 !important;
}

.product-widget ul {
    list-style: none;
}

div#text-4 p {
    max-width: 100% !important;
}

.product-widget .widget fieldset p {
    margin-top: -10px;
    margin-bottom: -10px;
}

/** Background Colors for Single Product and Reviews **/
div.product {
    background: var(--scrub-daddy-white) !important;
}

/** Forms **/
/** My Account/Orders **/
.shop_table.subscription_details .button,
.woocommerce-account .my_account_orders .button {
    background: var(--scrub-daddy-blue) !important;
}

/** My Account **/
.woocommerce label {
    text-align: left;
    color: var(--scrub-daddy-blue) !important;
}

.woocommerce-MyAccount-navigation ul li.woocommerce-MyAccount-navigation-link--subscriptions a::before,
.woocommerce-MyAccount-navigation ul li.woocommerce-MyAccount-navigation-link--wt-smart-coupon a::before {
    background: var(--scrub-daddy-black);
    -webkit-mask-image: url("data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf8,%3Csvg width='24' height='24' viewBox='0 0 24 24' fill='none' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cpath d='M16.023 9.348h4.992v-.001M2.985 19.644v-4.992m0 0h4.992m-4.993 0 3.181 3.183a8.25 8.25 0 0 0 13.803-3.7M4.031 9.865a8.25 8.25 0 0 1 13.803-3.7l3.181 3.182m0-4.991v4.99' stroke='%234A5568' stroke-width='1.5' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round'/%3E%3C/svg%3E");

.woocommerce-MyAccount-navigation ul li.woocommerce-MyAccount-navigation-link--giftcards a::before {
    background: var(--scrub-daddy-black);
    -webkit-mask-image: url("data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf8,%3Csvg width='24' height='24' viewBox='0 0 24 24' fill='none' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cpath d='M21 11.25v8.25a1.5 1.5 0 0 1-1.5 1.5H5.25a1.5 1.5 0 0 1-1.5-1.5v-8.25M12 4.875A2.625 2.625 0 1 0 9.375 7.5H12m0-2.625V7.5m0-2.625A2.625 2.625 0 1 1 14.625 7.5H12m0 0V21m-8.625-9.75h18c.621 0 1.125-.504 1.125-1.125v-1.5c0-.621-.504-1.125-1.125-1.125h-18c-.621 0-1.125.504-1.125 1.125v1.5c0 .621.504 1.125 1.125 1.125Z' stroke='%234A5568' stroke-width='1.5' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round'/%3E%3C/svg%3E");

/** Foam2Fuel Rewards **/

.wt_coupon_wrapper {
	gap: 6px;
}

.wt_sc_available_coupon_sort_by {
	display: none;
}

.wt_coupon_wrapper .wt-single-coupon, .wt_coupon_wrapper .wt-sc-hidden-coupon-box {
	min-width: 200px;
	max-width: 250px;
}

/** Add Product Button **/
.gpnf-add-entry {
    color: white;
    background-color: var(--scrub-daddy-blue);
    border-radius: var(--radius-2em) !important;
    text-transform: capitalize;
    padding: .6180469716em 1.41575em;
}

.gpnf-add-entry:hover {
    background-color: var(--scrub-daddy-blue);
}

/** Activate Rewards Button Padding **/
#pwbox-79024 {
    margin-bottom: 15px;
}

/** Wishlist Table **/
.commercekit-wishlist-table .cart button {
    border-radius: var(--radius-2em) !important;
}

form.woocommerce-form.woocommerce-form-track-order.track_order {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
}

p.form-row.form-row-first {
    margin-right: 0 !important;
}

p.form-row.form-row-last label,
p.form-row.form-row-first label {
    text-align: left;
    color: var(--scrub-daddy-blue);
}

/** Contact Form **/
input#orderid,
input#order_email {
    background: #EFF4FF !important;
    padding: 1em;
    border-radius: var(--radius-2em) !important;
    border: none;
    padding-left: 2em;
}

label.gfield_label.gform-field-label {
    color: var(--scrub-daddy-blue);
}

.ginput_container.ginput_container_select {
    background: var(--scrub-daddy-white);
    border-radius: 20px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
}

/** Reviews & BazaarVoice **/
[data-bv-show="rating_summary"] .bv_main_container .bv_button_buttonMinimalist {
    display: none !important;
}

.bv_button_component_container {
    margin-top: 15px;
}

.sp-testimonial-free-section.swiper-initialized {
    padding: 10px !important;
}

.sp-testimonial-free {
    padding: 35px 15px;
    box-shadow: var(--box-shadow-light);
}

.sp-testimonial-title .sp-testimonial-post-title {
    color: var(--scrub-daddy-blue) !important;
}

.sp-testimonial-free [data-bv-show=inline_rating] .bv_main_container.bv_inline_rating_container_left {
    justify-content: center !important;
}

div#commercekit-atc-tabs-wrap {
    background: #f8f8f8;
}

.woocommerce-tabs .panel {
    padding-top: 0;
}

/** Checkout **/
form.checkout.woocommerce-checkout h3,
form.checkout.woocommerce-checkout h4 {
    text-transform: capitalize;
}

.shoptimizer-cart-wrapper .cross-sells {
    margin-top: 25px;
    border-top: 1px var(--scrub-daddy-light-grey) solid;
    padding-top: 20px;
}

.woocommerce-message {
    background: var(--scrub-daddy-orange) !important;
    color: var(--scrub-daddy-black) !important;
}

form#checkout h3 {
    text-transform: capitalize;
}

span.optional {
    display: none;
}

.middle-row {
    font-family: var(--scrub-daddy-font) !important;
}

.product-title {
    font-family: var(--scrub-daddy-font) !important;
    font-size: 18px !important;
}

.product-title a:hover {
    text-decoration: underline;
    color: var(--scrub-daddy-blue);
}

/** Patent Table **/
table.tableizer-table {
    font-size: 12px;
    border: 1px solid var(--scrub-daddy-light-grey);
}

.tableizer-table td {
    padding: 4px;
    margin: 3px;
    border: 1px solid var(--scrub-daddy-light-grey);
}

.tableizer-table th {
    background-color: var(--scrub-daddy-blue);
    color: var(--scrub-daddy-white);
    text-align: center;
    font-weight: var(--weight-bold);
}

/** SBI Social Lightbox **/
#sbi_lightbox .sbi_lightbox_action {
    display: none !important;
}

/** Zonos hiding domestic elements from international customers **/
.z-intl .wc-braintree-paypal-mini-cart-button.button.paypal-active, .z-intl .wc-braintree-paypal-top-container, .z-intl [id^="select2-billing_country-result-"][id$="-US"], .z-intl #place_order, .z-intl #wc-braintree-cart-fields-form > ul, .z-intl #nav-menu-item-101430, .z-intl #nav-menu-item-722432 {
display: none !important;
}

[id^="select2-billing_country-result-"][id$="-CA"] {
    display: none !important;
}

ul.products li.product .price {
	color: var(--scrub-daddy-blue);
  font-weight: var(--weight-bold);
}

/** Landing pages **/




/** Media Queries **/
@media only screen and (max-width: 600px) {
    .parallax-cover {
        height: 350px !important;
    }

    .sp-testimonial-free-section.swiper-initialized {
        padding: unset !important;
    }

    .sp-testimonial-free {
        box-shadow: 0 0 0 #00000060;
    }
}

@media (max-width: 992px) {
    .product-details-wrapper {
        display: block !important;
    }
}

@media only screen and (max-width: 1000px) {
    .site-footer .col-full {
        max-width: 85% !important;
        margin-left: auto !important;
        margin-right: auto !important;
    }

    .below-content .col-full {
        max-width: 85% !important;
        margin-left: auto !important;
        margin-right: auto !important;
    }
}

@media (max-width: 1200px) {
    .parallax-cover {
        height: 450px;
    }
}		</style>
